events.text: Jonathan de Guzmán (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 0. Xabi Alonso (Spain) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Stefan de Vrij (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 1. Robin van Persie (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Daley Blind with a through ball.
Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 2. Arjen Robben (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Daley Blind with a through ball.
Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 3. Stefan de Vrij (Netherlands) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal    following a set piece situation.
Iker Casillas (Spain) is shown the yellow card.
Robin van Persie (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 4. Robin van Persie (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.

Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 5. Arjen Robben (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Wesley Sneijder with a through ball   following a fast break.

venue.name: Casa de Apostas Arena Fonte Nova
